Glenvale Drive Thru.action: Culture: hellos dipped during the view, focus on the door for 90%+; queue calling observed but missed some opportunities; use a tray to clear tables. Shift Management: drive-thru transactions all processed as 'dine in' - adjusted to process as takeaway, check this stays consistent. Maintenance: ice cream machine awaiting engineer.

Culture: productivity lower than normal, some leaning; flag break cover to the viewer. Cleanliness: syrup pumps/stands sticky, add to daily clean; deck needs jet washing to avoid ants. Product: croissant marked good - black specks from cooking matt, wipe matts down.

Culture: consistent hellos and goodbyes during peak; thorough figure-of-8 incl toilet/outside checks; call the queue when it arises. Cleanliness: chewing gum under a couple of tables, add to weekly schedule.
Culture: consistent hellos and goodbyes during peak; thorough figure-of-8 incl toilet/outside checks; call the queue when it arises. Cleanliness: chewing gum under tables, add to weekly schedule.

Leamington Parade.action: Culture: queue calling - '2 is a queue', deliver at every opportunity. Shift Management: panini fridge availability under the 90% required. Cleanliness: all freezers due a defrost; poor mopping on close caused build-up - correct solution:water ratio and rinse the mop.

Culture: queue calling - embedding consistent delivery, '2 is a queue'; safe tray stacking. Shift Management: all transactions processed as 'dine in' when there were takeaways - process accurately, VAT implication. Cleanliness: dust/spillages on shelving behind the bar.

Culture: peak-time consistent delivery of hellos and goodbyes; safe stacking of trays. Shift Management: cash reconciliation outside parameters. Cleanliness: chewing gum under a table; wipe blender after every use; fridge/freezer bases daily.
